title: Staz's Better Adventures
description: A modified version of Flowstate's and  FluffyPuppyKasey Better Adventures+ and Better Adventures++ modpack's that adds a few mods I feel keep the spirit of the original.
body:
A modified version of Flowstate's and  FluffyPuppyKasey Better Adventures+ and Better Adventures++ modpack's that adds a few mods I feel keep the spirit of the original.

We all love Minecraft, but it can get a bit stale at times. This modpack contains more then 100 mods that will enhance the Vanilla experience with some advance mods i.e Applied energestics.

You will find dozens of quality of life mods, visual changes, added ambience, and more, which will breathe life into your worlds and builds. These mods have also been tested on a modded Fabric server, so you can play with your friends too if you decide to set that up!

Also, please support the creators of all of these mods and added content! They make great stuff, go check them out!

Some mods in this pack require I link back to them, so please go support the developers of them as well:

https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kiwi-fabric

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves-fabric

https://www.stardustlabs.net/

IMPORTANT:

This modpack is built around Fabric (0.16.9) and Minecraft 1.20.1. These are the only supported versions at this time.
There have been some crashing issues related to UI elements. Like with any modpack, crashing is to be expected, but just be aware.

Check out a full breakdown of the modpack on YouTube below:

[How To Make Minecraft Feel Like A Sequel [Part 1]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=phoW7znBn_E)

[50+ Mods That Enhance Vanilla Minecraft [Part 2]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QDJO9a1FaEw)

Both these video describe all the mods from the orginal Modpack. Any mods not inculded in the videos are mods that I have added myself.
